zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tyndale於1368年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾武德爾時，他的父親William de Tyndale24歲，母親Lady Elizabeth De Deane21歲。他與Catherine la Zouche在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1413年8月8日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾迪尼享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Tyndale于1368年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾武德爾时，他的父亲William de Tyndale24岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth De Deane21岁。他与Catherine la Zouche在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1413年8月8日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾迪尼享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyndale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex and Nottinghamshire): variant of   Tindall  . This surname is also established in Jamaica.

variants.name: Tindall
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from Tynedale, the valley of the river Tyne, or from a place in Cumbria called Tindale, which is situated on a tributary of the South Tyne. The name derives from a British river name Tina (apparently from a Celtic root meaning ‘to flow’) + Old English dæl or Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Tyndale was born in 1368, in Oundle, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Tyndale, was 24 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth De Deane, was 21. He married Catherine la Zouche in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 8 August 1413, in Deene, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tyndale est né en 1368, à Oundle, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Tyndale, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth De Deane, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Catherine la Zouche à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 8 août 1413, à Deene, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Tyndale 1368 in Oundle, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Tyndale 24 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth De Deane 21. Er hat in Northamptonshire, England Catherine la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 8. August 1413 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Deene, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Tyndale è nato il nel 1368 nel Oundle, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Tyndale, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth De Deane, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Catherine la Zouche nel Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 8 agosto 1413, nel Deene, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tyndaleが1368年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアオウンドルで生まれた時，父William de Tyndaleは24歳，母Lady Elizabeth De Deaneは21歳であった。イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでCatherine la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1413年8月8日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアディーンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Tyndale(이)가 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 우들일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Tyndale(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth De Deane(은)는 21세였다. 그는 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Catherine la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1413년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 디니에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tyndale nasceu em 1368, em Oundle, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Tyndale, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth De Deane, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine la Zouche em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1413, em Deene, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tyndale родился в 1368 г. в местности оундл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Tyndale было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth De Deane, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine la Zouche в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 8 августа 1413 г. в местности дин, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Tyndale nació en 1368, en Oundle, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Tyndale, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth De Deane, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Catherine la Zouche en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1413, en Deene, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
